subject: [PATCH v3 08/16] userfaultfd: add UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT plumbing

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds support for read-write protection tracking to the userfaultfd interface. It introduces two new syscalls, UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT, which allow userspace to register a range for RWP tracking and install/remove RWP on that range. The feature is only available on 64-bit kernels with certain architecture features enabled. The patch also includes plumbing for the new syscalls and updates various kernel files to support them.
